languages.text: "О-о-о, нет-нет-нет, шерин, я знаю этот взгляд, и ничем хорошим он обычно не заканчивается! Лучше выбросьте эту дрянь и пойдем отсюда, м?"

languages.text: "O-o-oh, shereen, no-no-no, I know this look and it seldom bodes well! Just toss away this rubbish and let's scram. Sounds like a plan, hm?"

traits.locale_text: "O-o-oh, shereen, no-no-no, I know this look and it seldom bodes well! Just toss away this rubbish and let's scram. Sounds like a plan, hm?"

languages.text: "O-o-oh, Shereen, nein-nein-nein, ich kenne diesen Blick und er verheißt selten Gutes! Schmeiß diesen Müll einfach weg und lass uns abhauen. Klingt wie ein Plan, hm?"
languages.original_text: "O-o-oh, shereen, no-no-no, I know this look and it seldom bodes well! Just toss away this rubbish and let's scram. Sounds like a plan, hm?"

traits.locale_text: "O-o-oh, Shereen, nein-nein-nein, ich kenne diesen Blick und er verheißt selten Gutes! Schmeiß diesen Müll einfach weg und lass uns abhauen. Klingt wie ein Plan, hm?"

languages.text: "O-o-oh, shereen, no-no-no, je connais ce regard et il est rarement de bon augure ! Jetons ces déchets et filons. C'est un bon plan, non ?"
languages.original_text: "O-o-oh, shereen, no-no-no, I know this look and it seldom bodes well! Just toss away this rubbish and let's scram. Sounds like a plan, hm?"

traits.locale_text: "O-o-oh, shereen, no-no-no, je connais ce regard et il est rarement de bon augure ! Jetons ces déchets et filons. C'est un bon plan, non ?"

languages.text: "O-o-oh, shereen, no-no-no, ¡conozco esa mirada y rara vez es de buen augurio! Tira esta basura y larguémonos. Suena como un plan, ¿eh?"
languages.original_text: "O-o-oh, shereen, no-no-no, I know this look and it seldom bodes well! Just toss away this rubbish and let's scram. Sounds like a plan, hm?"

languages.text: "O-o-oh, shereen, hayır-hayır-hayır, bu bakışı biliyorum ve nadiren iyiye işarettir! Bu çöpü bir kenara at ve kaçalım. Kulağa bir plan gibi geliyor, hm?"
